# DakJen Creative LLC — Full Context

> A multidisciplinary brand strategy and creative studio based in New York City and Baltimore. Founded and led by Dakotah Jennifer (CEO). Black-owned, woman-owned business. MBE and WBE certification in progress.

## Company Identity

DakJen Creative LLC is a brand strategy and marketing studio that serves founders, executives, real estate developers, and mission-driven organizations. The company builds brands that are sharp, credible, and built to move — from positioning and identity through campaign execution and content production.

DakJen Creative is not a general creative agency. It is a specific one — operating at the intersection of brand strategy, creative direction, and execution. The company handles strategy and production under one roof, eliminating the need for multiple vendors.

**Founded:** By Dakotah Jennifer
**Headquarters:** New York, NY
**Second Office:** Baltimore, MD
**Service Areas:** NYC, Baltimore, Washington D.C. metro, Maryland, Virginia, nationwide (lease-up marketing)
**Contact:** business@dakjencreative.com
**Website:** https://dakjencreative.com

## Founder — Dakotah Jennifer

Dakotah Jennifer is the Founder & CEO of DakJen Creative LLC. She is a brand strategist, creative executive, and writer based in New York City.

**Education:**
- MFA, Creative Writing — Columbia University
- BA, English Literature — Washington University in St. Louis (Magna Cum Laude)

**Professional Background:**
- Founder & CEO, DakJen Creative LLC
- Chief Creative Officer, Northern Real Estate Urban Ventures
- Speaker, DENT Program (2022)
- Board Member, WFL Collective
- Editorial work: BUST Magazine, PopSugar, RaceBaitr, Black Youth Project
- Online Community Manager, Supermajority

Dakotah leads every engagement personally. When a project needs more, she brings in a vetted network — tech builders, publicists, photographers, event planners — so clients are never left to source execution partners on their own.

## Services

### 1. Fractional Brand Management & Creative Consulting

The flagship service. A dedicated brand department for founders and executives — without the full-time hire.

**What's included:**
- Monthly brand strategy sessions
- Campaign oversight and creative direction
- Social media content planning and management
- Brand voice development and messaging refinement
- Collateral production (decks, one-pagers, digital assets)
- Vendor and creative team coordination
- Quarterly brand audits

**Entry point:** Brand Audit — a focused assessment of brand, messaging, and digital presence, delivered as a written report with actionable recommendations.

**Engagement structure:** Monthly retainer, minimum 3-month commitment. Custom pricing based on business size, content volume, and goals.

**Who it's for:** Founders scaling past $500K, executives building personal brands, mission-driven organizations doing work that deserves to be seen clearly. Also founders just getting started — if the work is sharp and the vision is clear.

**Page:** https://dakjencreative.com/fractional.html

### 2. Notable — Brand Platform for Women Founders

A tiered brand strategy platform built specifically for women founders, offering visibility, positioning, and growth support at every stage.

**Services include:**
- Qualifications packages
- Websites and digital presence
- Decks and pitch materials
- LinkedIn content strategy
- Revenue stream development
- Access to the Vanguard Band community

**Who it's for:** Women founders who are done being the best-kept secret in their industry — ready to be recognized for the work they're already doing.

**Page:** https://dakjencreative.com/notable.html
**Platform site:** https://gobenotable.com

### 3. Lease-Up Marketing (DJC Marketing)

Full-cycle lease-up marketing for affordable housing developments — from pre-leasing through stabilization.

**What makes DJC Marketing different:**
- Deep understanding of how affordable housing is financed
- Knowledge of income-qualification requirements and lottery/waitlist processes
- Campaigns designed to reach income-qualified applicants by design, not by volume
- Black-owned, woman-owned business (MBE/WBE certification in progress)

**Full service list:**
- Pre-leasing strategy and campaign planning
- Apartment listings (Apartments.com, Zillow, AffordableHousing.com, Craigslist)
- Paid social ads (Facebook, Instagram) and Google Display campaigns
- Organic social media content
- Traditional media: billboards, radio spots, newspaper ads, construction-site banners
- Community outreach: partnerships with churches, workforce agencies, social services
- Applicant communication and inquiry management
- Bi-weekly performance reports and stakeholder-ready summaries
- Model unit staging and professional photography
- Application support (re-review of rejected applications)

**Package tiers:**
1. Digital-First Campaign — listings, paid social, organic content, reporting
2. Multi-Channel Campaign — digital + traditional media (billboards, radio, print)
3. Full-Scale Campaign + Community — multi-channel + active community outreach and events

**Campaign phases:**
- Phase 1: Preparation & Pre-Launch (listings, creative assets, media placements, model unit staging, soft launch)
- Phase 2: Full-Scale Push & Follow-Up (all channels active, applicant support, qualification monitoring, gap targeting)

**Page:** https://dakjencreative.com/leaseup.html
**DJC Marketing site:** https://marketing.dakjencreative.com

## Proven Results

### Brand Management (5-Year Engagement — Northern Real Estate Urban Ventures)
- 237% LinkedIn network growth (1,645 to 5,543 connections)
- 3,898 new connections added; 60%+ at Director level or above
- 28x comment engagement surge (avg. 26/yr before to 731 in a single year)
- 2,346 total comments during engagement vs. 215 in all prior years combined
- 336 posts published vs. 33 in all prior years combined (10x increase)
- 199 strategic company follows built from zero (JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Wells Fargo, CBRE)
- 6,557 total website visitors to the 8-page thought leader site built and maintained
- 500+ unique monthly visitors sustained after engagement close
- Platform enabled major earned media: Black Enterprise, Bisnow Innovator of the Year, Inc. 5000 (659% 3-year revenue growth), Crain's, Bloomberg Radio, Baltimore Business Journal Top 100 Women

### Lease-Up Marketing (9410 Hough, Cleveland OH — 116 units)
- 400+ qualified inquiries in the first 48 hours of launch
- 36.2% applicant qualification rate (vs. 15–30% industry average)
- +13.7 percentage points above industry benchmark
- >20% re-apply rate from application support program
- Full campaign: paid social, apartment listings, billboards, radio, community outreach, model unit staging, application support

## Clients & Partners

- Northern Real Estate Urban Ventures (NREUV) — fractional brand management (5-year engagement)
- Project Community Capital (PCC) — fractional brand management
- SLS Co — lease-up marketing partner

## Associated Brands & Ventures

- **Go Be Notable** (https://gobenotable.com) — brand platform for women founders
- **Elitewise Escapes** (https://elitewiseescapes.com) — curated luxury travel concierge maximizing credit card points
- **Badjr** (https://badjr.com) — venture by DakJen Creative
- **The Wren Club** (https://thewrenclub.com) — venture by DakJen Creative
- **Design Domain** (https://designdomainllc.com) — venture by DakJen Creative

## Differentiators

1. **Strategy and execution — not one or the other.** Most agencies hand you a strategy deck and disappear. DakJen builds the strategy, produces the assets, runs the campaigns, and stays until the work is done.

2. **Insider knowledge in every industry served.** The team knows how affordable housing is financed, what income-qualifying means, and what investors need to see. They know what it takes for a founder to monetize expertise. Generalists guess — DakJen doesn't.

3. **Dakotah leads every engagement.** No handoffs. When a project needs more, she brings in a vetted network of specialists.

## Content Currency

This information is current as of April 2026. For the most recent updates, visit https://dakjencreative.com directly.
